Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-19 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data shows TNGX dominating the momentum rankings with an exceptional score of 98.5, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 988% over one year while maintaining all four SMA gates above their key moving averages. The ratio consistency is near-perfect at 99.9, with returns accelerating proportionally across timeframes (1.33x to 8.6x step-ups), and TNGX outperforms SPY by 970.81% annually and even resilience-tested QQQ by 963.68%. PRE follows as a secondary play with a 385% annual return and perfect SMA positioning, though it shows weaker short-term momentum (1.54% weekly return versus TNGX's 12.3%) and a concerning ratio breakdown where 1-week return lags 1-day returns (0.49x ratio). Both top-ranked tickers pass all SMA gates and demonstrate clean momentum signals with normal volatility profiles, but TNGX's consistency across all return metrics and ratio checkpoints marks it as the standout performer in today's analysis.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
